entries.text: The Primal Club is a wild ride with 480 unique digital primates just waiting for their new homes! 🐒 Run by monkeys, fueled by chaos—this is where the good vibes are at. Minting earns you +3 bonus spins on the richart.app! 🔥 Check it out: https://richart.app/primal-club

Just stumbled upon the Cyber Spikes collection — these slim characters with massive spiky heads are next level! 🤯 The glowing-symbol faces and futuristic streetwear are a must-see. Minting earns you +3 bonus spins on the richart.app spinner! 🔥 https://richart.app/spikes

Did you know? Every track in the Bitcoin Mixtape is 100% on-chain! 🎶 It’s a dynamic archive of audio, permanently inscribed as Ordinals. With high-quality sound and an interactive tracklist, it’s a music experience like no other. Check it out: https://richart.app/bitcoin-mixtape

Join the Primal Club — a community of 480 unique digital primates! 🐒 This is where collectors, dreamers, and Web3 degenerates come together in beautiful chaos. Minting your primate earns you +3 spins on the richart.app prize spinner! Let's go! 🔥 https://richart.app/primal-club
